name: dbt-wiki
description: Local-only LLM-queryable knowledge base for dbt projects. No dbt Cloud required. Init reads target/manifest.json (model metadata, ref/source lineage, schema.yml columns, tests) plus target/compiled/**/*.sql parsed via sqlglot to extract column-level lineage. Generates one markdown entity per model/source/macro under .dbt-wiki/, plus DAG visualization and tier/materialization indices. Query answers natural-language questions about model structure, column-level data flow, materialization config, test coverage, and refactoring impact (rename/delete propagation). Coexists with repo-wiki: dbt-wiki for STRUCTURE, repo-wiki for WHY. Requires sqlglot (pip install).
